name: ng-sheet
title: Sheet (Angular)
description: Side-anchored panel for longer flows, built on Spartan-ng brain Sheet with a directional slide animation. Use for filters, settings panels, multi-section edit forms. Mirrors React Sheet from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-sheet.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
